title: deer-flow.subagent.lifecycle v1
description: SubagentExecutor state machine transitions. Distinct from deer-flow.agent.thread.v1, which tracks top-level agent threads (Claude/Codex/etc); this channel tracks LangGraph SubagentExecutor children. PENDING state is intentionally not emitted (too transient). Source: /deer-flow/subagents.

parent_thread_id.description: thread_id of the agent that dispatched this subagent (correlates to deer-flow.agent.thread.v1)

subagent_id.description: Unique identifier for this subagent invocation; stable across the running → terminal transition

duration_ms.description: Wall-clock duration for terminal events (completed/failed/timed_out); null on running

error.description: Error message for failed events (truncated 500 chars); null otherwise
